chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-249 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.08.2021 Mr. Rao Faisal Ali, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General alongwith ASI Muhammad Yousuf from FIA, Mirpurkhas. = At the very outset, it is stated by learned Counsel for the applicant that after submission of final challan before the Court having jurisdiction, the situation of the case has been changed, therefore, if the applicant is permitted to file fresh bail application before the learned trial Court, then he would not press the disposal of instant bail application on merits before this Court. Order accordingly. It is made clear that; if the fresh bail application is filed by the applicant, then it would be disposed of by learned Trial Court, on its own merits strictly in accordance with law without being influenced by the previous proceedings. JUDGE Shahid
